category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Oman DGSM conformity, GSO energy labelling/MEPS, and GSO/IEC safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Oman Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入阿曼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入阿曼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Oman DGSM conformity registration, GSO energy-efficiency label/MEPS, GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, R-600a refrigerant handling, TRA radio approval, and in-country importer requirements administered by MOCIIP and DGSM.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与阿曼DGSM符合性注册、海湾标准化组织（GSO）能效标签/最低能效标准（MEPS）、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全、R-600a制冷剂处理、TRA无线电核准及境内进口商要求差距对照，相关要求由MOCIIP及DGSM管理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與阿曼DGSM符合性註冊、海灣標準化組織（GSO）能效標籤/最低能效標準（MEPS）、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全、R-600a製冷劑處理、TRA無線電核准及境內進口商要求差距對照，相關要求由MOCIIP及DGSM管理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Omani legislation, DGSM conformity requirements, GSO standards and MEPS thresholds, energy-label provisions, and importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿曼法律、DGSM符合性要求、GSO标准及MEPS门槛值、能效标签条款及进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿曼法律、DGSM符合性要求、GSO標準及MEPS門檻值、能效標籤條款及進口商義務。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Oman compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to GSO IEC 60335-2-24 under the DGSM conformity scheme — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) GSO energy-efficiency label and MEPS compliance (GSO 2530 / GCC energy-label scheme) recalculated to the GSO methodology before registration; (3) a DGSM product conformity/registration certificate obtained through an in-country importer of record (Oman is 240 V / 50 Hz, so the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V); and (4) any wireless/smart connectivity requires TRA radio type approval. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but the charge and documentation must be verified against GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA. Customs clearance is via Sohar or Salalah with a registered Omani importer.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大阿曼合规差距：（1）依据DGSM符合性制度按GSO IEC 60335-2-24进行电气安全合格评定——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）符合GSO能效标签及最低能效标准（GSO 2530／海合会能效标签制度），并在注册前按GSO方法重新计算；（3）通过境内进口商（importer of record）取得DGSM产品符合性／注册证书（阿曼为240 V／50 Hz，故50 Hz频率与中国一致，但额定电压不同于中国的220/380 V）；（4）任何无线／智能连接功能须取得TRA无线电型号核准。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件，但须依据GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA核实充注量及文件。清关经苏哈尔（Sohar）或塞拉莱（Salalah）口岸，须由注册的阿曼进口商办理。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大阿曼合規差距：（1）依據DGSM符合性制度按GSO IEC 60335-2-24進行電氣安全合格評定——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）符合GSO能效標籤及最低能效標準（GSO 2530／海合會能效標籤制度），並在註冊前按GSO方法重新計算；（3）通過境內進口商（importer of record）取得DGSM產品符合性／註冊證書（阿曼為240 V／50 Hz，故50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但額定電壓不同於中國的220/380 V）；（4）任何無線／智慧連接功能須取得TRA無線電型號核准。R-600a製冷劑具備良好條件，但須依據GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA核實充注量及文件。清關經蘇哈爾（Sohar）或塞拉萊（Salalah）口岸，須由註冊的阿曼進口商辦理。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (MOCIIP, DGSM, TRA), GSO standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted.
